## 📝 Description

Please describe the changes in this pull request and what problem they solve.

## 🔗 Related Issues

If this fixes a bug or relates to an open issue, link it here:
* Fixes # (issue number)

## ✔️ Checklist

Before submitting this PR, please check that you have:
- [ ] Tested your changes locally in the browser
- [ ] Kept the code lightweight and fast (no added bloat)
- [ ] Verified that all user data is stored locally (no external server calls)
- [ ] Documented your changes if needed
